capabilities.description: Take a selfie with the front camera after an optional countdown.
disambiguationHints: ONLY use this when the user explicitly says selfie or front camera.
Do NOT use for generic 'take a photo' — that should go to rear camera.

parameters.name: duration_seconds
parameters.extractionHint: Extract the countdown duration in seconds. Look for any number followed by 'seconds' or time words, even if preceded by 'and' or 'in' (STT may mishear 'in' as 'and'). Examples: '5 seconds' → 5, 'and 3 seconds' → 3, 'in 10 seconds' → 10, '2 minutes' → 120, 'half a minute' → 30. Return null if no duration/countdown/timer is mentioned.

capabilities.executionMessage: Opening front camera to take a photo.
capabilities.sideEffects: Saves a new photo to the device gallery.

capabilities.description: Open Libre Camera and take a photo with the rear camera after an optional countdown.
disambiguationHints: This is the DEFAULT photo action. Use for any generic photo request.
Use when the user says 'take a photo', 'take a picture', 'capture', 'snap'.
Only use front camera instead when the user explicitly says 'selfie' or 'front camera'.

parameters.name: duration_seconds
parameters.extractionHint: Extract the countdown duration in seconds. Look for any number followed by 'seconds' or time words, even if preceded by 'and' or 'in' (STT may mishear 'in' as 'and'). Examples: '5 seconds' → 5, 'and 3 seconds' → 3, 'in 10 seconds' → 10, '2 minutes' → 120, 'half a minute' → 30. Return null if no duration/countdown/timer is mentioned.

capabilities.executionMessage: Opening rear camera to take a photo.
capabilities.sideEffects: Saves a new photo to the device gallery.

capabilities.description: Start recording a selfie video with the front camera.
disambiguationHints: ONLY use when the user explicitly says selfie video or front camera video.
Do NOT use for generic 'record a video' — that should go to rear camera.
capabilities.executionMessage: Opening front camera to start recording.
capabilities.sideEffects: Starts recording video, saved to device gallery when stopped.

capabilities.description: Open Libre Camera and start recording video with the rear camera.
disambiguationHints: This is the DEFAULT video action. Use for any generic video request.
Use when the user says 'record a video', 'start recording video', 'film'.
Only use front camera instead when the user explicitly says 'selfie video' or 'front camera'.
capabilities.executionMessage: Opening rear camera to start recording.
capabilities.sideEffects: Starts recording video, saved to device gallery when stopped.
